sprint.goal: Reduce false-positive governance denials blocking swarm agents: #1209 (MCP prefix match) → #1202 (KE-2 AAB normalization — strip rtk/time/timeout prefixes) → #1208 (heredoc false positive verify) → #1139 ($(date) command scanner allowlist).

senior.title: Fix AAB normalization gap + MCP prefix match + heredoc false positive + $(date) scanner
senior.note: Sequence: #1209 first (1h warm-up — MCP exact-match → startsWith in matchers/policy). Then #1202 flagship (KE-2: strip rtk/time/timeout prefixes in aab.ts before pattern matching; emit UnknownActionType WARNING event; audit tool-action-map.json). Then verify #1208 (heredoc false positive — may still fire on commandViolation includes check at definitions.ts:1229-1232). Finally #1139 ($(date +format) safe-subshell allowlist in packages/matchers/src/command-scanner.ts). Issue #1182 CLOSED (PR #1212 merged).
